title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_models.py (第 1 至 260 行，共 387 行) ---
   1 | # core/memory_models.py
   2 | """
   3 | 结构化摘要数据模型
   4 | 
   5 | 用于存储会话摘要的结构化信息，包括：
   6 | - 任务目标
   7 | - 文件变更列表
   8 | - 错误记录
   9 | - 工具使用情况
  10 | - 关键决策
  11 | """
  12 | 
  13 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  14 | from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional
  15 | from datetime import datetime
  16 | import json
  17 | 
  18 | 
  19 | TASK_STATUS_COMPLETED = "completed"
  20 | TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
  21 | TASK_STATUS_FAILED = "failed"
  22 | TASK_STATUS_CANCELLED = "cancelled"
  23 | VALID_TASK_STATUSES = {
  24 |     TASK_STATUS_COMPLETED,
  25 |     TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS,
  26 |     TASK_STATUS_FAILED,
  27 |     TASK_STATUS_CANCELLED,
  28 | }
  29 | TASK_STATUS_ALIASES = {
  30 |     "done": TASK_STATUS_COMPLETED,
  31 |     "complete": TASK_STATUS_COMPLETED,
  32 |     "completed": TASK_STATUS_COMPLETED,
  33 |     "success": TASK_STATUS_COMPLETED,
  34 |     "succeeded": TASK_STATUS_COMPLETED,
  35 |     "finished": TASK_STATUS_COMPLETED,
  36 |     "in_progress": TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS,
  37 |     "in-progress": TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS,
  38 |     "progress": TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS,
  39 |     "ongoing": TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS,
  40 |     "pending": TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS,
  41 |     "todo": TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS,
  42 |     "failed": TASK_STATUS_FAILED,
  43 |     "fail": TASK_STATUS_FAILED,
  44 |     "error": TASK_STATUS_FAILED,
  45 |     "cancelled": TASK_STATUS_CANCELLED,
  46 |     "canceled": TASK_STATUS_CANCELLED,
  47 |     "cancel": TASK_STATUS_CANCELLED,
  48 | }
  49 | 
  50 | 
  51 | def normalize_task_status(status: Any, default: str = TASK_STATUS_IN_PROGRESS) -> str:
  52 |     """
  53 |     将来自 LLM、旧 session 或测试数据的任务状态归一化为标准枚举。
  54 | 
  55 |     标准枚举：completed / in_progress / failed / cancelled。
  56 |     未知、空值或非字符串输入会回退到 default（默认 in_progress）。
  57 |     """
  58 |     if not isinstance(status, str):
  59 |         return default
  60 | 
  61 |     normalized = status.strip().lower().replace(" ", "_")
  62 |     return TASK_STATUS_ALIASES.get(normalized, default)
  63 | 
  64 | 
  65 | @dataclass
  66 | class FileChange:
  67 |     """文件变更记录"""
  68 |     path: str  # 文件路径
  69 |     action: str  # 操作类型: created, modified, deleted
  70 |     summary: str  # 变更摘要
  71 |     importance: float = 0.5  # 重要性分数 [0, 1]
  72 |     lines_added: int = 0  # 新增行数
  73 |     lines_removed: int = 0  # 删除行数
  74 | 
  75 |     def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  76 |         """序列化为字典"""
  77 |         return {
  78 |             "path": self.path,
  79 |             "action": self.action,
  80 |             "summary": self.summary,
  81 |             "importance": self.importance,
  82 |             "lines_added": self.lines_added,
  83 |             "lines_removed": self.lines_removed
  84 |         }
  85 | 
  86 |     @classmethod
  87 |     def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> "FileChange":
  88 |         """从字典反序列化，兼容旧数据中的 file_path 字段"""
  89 |         return cls(
  90 |             path=data.get("path") or data.get("file_path", ""),
  91 |             action=data.get("action", "modified"),
  92 |             summary=data.get("summary", ""),
  93 |             importance=data.get("importance", 0.5),
  94 |             lines_added=data.get("lines_added", 0),
  95 |             lines_removed=data.get("lines_removed", 0)
  96 |         )
  97 | 
  98 | 
  99 | @dataclass
 100 | class ErrorRecord:
 101 |     """错误记录"""
 102 |     error_type: str  # 错误类型（如 FileNotFoundError, SyntaxError）
 103 |     error_message: str  # 错误信息
 104 |     timestamp: str  # 时间戳
 105 |     file_path: Optional[str] = None  # 相关文件路径
 106 |     line_number: Optional[int] = None  # 错误行号
 107 |     solution: Optional[str] = None  # 解决方案
 108 |     resolved: bool = False  # 是否已解决
 109 | 
 110 |     def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 111 |         """序列化为字典"""
 112 |         return {
 113 |             "error_type": se...
